title: LOCREANCE LP1 Press Release
content:
LOCREANCE LP1 Press Release

Three guys from across the country ended up in a grad school down in Florida and bonded over their love of music. One hip hop head, one blues and bluegrass guitar picker, and one drum machine and synth nerd. And now that it’s over, this is what we came up with!

Hip-Hop/Alt/Rock group based out of South Florida. We aim to blend varying genres and styles to produce dynamic new perspectives on our modern culture.


ragbone


warfare
Thrash metal meets punk chorus meets

twentyone ft BIZARRE

roaches
Blues bar fight with a knife in the throat.

oceanblood
Boyz-in-the-hood Backstreet Boys melody, over watery synth lines and jangly beats.

victory
Sloppy, drunk, rambucous, feel good jam to blast at a party.
